{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220707041BF2DFCE84CD3A2AE91E"}"},"total":924},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7452773516799623960","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作为奥特同人文感觉写的蛮不错的，应该是评论太少了，所以评分不高，但雀食值得一看[敬礼][敬礼]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735244263,"group_id":"7435784678008687678","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喷子爬开好吧","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+rGfpLqAKMHp6sHEdXbM5L6PSiNV6mjfoHH91iShq8a","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b4c32d959e63449b853bf6c48801b1d2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702688&x-signature=V5VFOuiv%2BEJVi0OAV%2FK5k1eONy8%3D","user_id":"2928703852786424","user_name":"是尘玖吖."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2928703852786424","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1724628428,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7435784678008687678","book_info":{"abstract":"（主角偏正派，有底线乐子人，大事正经小事发癫，传递奥特精神，弥补遗憾，无系统，剧情会写的比较细。有点类似单元剧。）
白月被布鲁顿吸进时空隧道。意外融合了部分雷布朗多因子。成为了雷奥尼克斯。
来到盖亚世界。开局直接收服眼Q，获得残缺的天空之光，顺便矫正一下盖亚和阿古茹。
在迪迦世界。写小说曝光超古代黑暗迪迦，融合邪恶迪迦的身躯。成为全新的雷伽特奥特曼。
在波利斯行星，击败雷布朗多，彻底终结雷奥尼克斯的宿命。
“美好的一天开始了，今天又要去哪里旅行呢”白月伸了个懒腰，微微一笑。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f89235c00716d0e2ba7d272e25232527","author":"大国主神","author_id":"","book_id":"7435784678008687678","book_name":"奥特：正义执行的旅行家","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7436303066283917886","read_count":"41777","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1398338"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"677","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,多女主,奥特同人,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8416c2c9ebc8035ac318f7090a8c374d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318424&x-signature=D4fE7z%2FEti8aAb1fBzCqI2Qm1QY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3196970230103261","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"78"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220707041BF2DFCE84CD3A2AE91E"}"},"relat
